summary: All 6 steps completed. Step 1: wrote failing test verifying currentFile/attachedContexts forwarding (failed as expected). Step 2: fixed App.tsx onSend to pass context directly instead of cherry-picking 3 fields. Step 3: added compile-time type assertion in claudeBridge.test.ts. Step 4: replaced standalone ClaudeMessageContext interface with re-export of MessageContext. Step 5: simplified types.typecheck.ts by removing redundant structural sync guard. Step 6: full test suite verification — 856 tests pass, tsc clean.
